author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Root cause: Embedding::forward creates the output tensor with EmbeddingBackward grad_fn on CPU (line 305), then calls result.to(device) to move it to GPU (line 310). But Tensor::to() uses from_storage which creates a leaf tensor — the grad_fn is silently dropped. The weight gradient is never computed because the graph is disconnected at the to() call. Fix: the forward should produce output directly on the correct device, or attach the grad_fn after the device transfer.
